description: Cylinder-count distribution of currently registered passenger cars. Use when user asks how many 3-cyl, V6, V8, V12, or 0-cyl EVs are in the fleet. Filters implausible values.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal >= 0 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal <= 16 | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY cylinders = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal | SORT cylinders ASC | LIMIT 20
